title: Invesco Closed-End Funds Pay Dividends
text: ATLANTA , July 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Trustees (the "Board") of each of Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust (each, a "Fund" and collectively, the "Funds") today announces the payment of the following dividends:   EX-DATE 7/14/23 RECORD DATE 7/17/23 REINVEST DATE 7/31/23 PAYABLE DATE 7/31/23 Name of Closed-EndManagement Investment Company   Ticker Dividend Amount Per Share (monthly) Change From Prior Distribution Invesco High Income Trust II VLT $0.09641 - Invesco Senior Income Trust VVR $0.0390 - 1 A portion of this distribution is estimated to be from a return of principal rather than net income.  The Section 19 notice referenced below provides more information and can be found on the Invesco website at www.invesco.com.

title: Investors Move Into Invesco's Bank ETF as Sector Rallies
text: Invesco's bank ETF has seen significant inflows as the sector rebounds on upbeat earnings reports. The Invesco KBW Bank ETF (KBWB) has seen $197 million in net flows over a one-week period, the third highest flows among Invesco's range of ETFs.

title: Invesco (IVZ) Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
text: Invesco (IVZ) records a rise in expenses in the second quarter of 2023.

title: Compared to Estimates, Invesco (IVZ) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Invesco (IVZ) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Invesco (IVZ) Misses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Invesco (IVZ) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.31 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.40 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.39 per share a year ago.

title: Invesco Reports Results for the Three Months Ended June 30, 2023
text: Invesco Announces Second Quarter Diluted EPS of $0.29; Adjusted Diluted EPS(1) of $0.31 ATLANTA , July 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) today reported financial results for the three months ended June 30, 2023.

title: Invesco's Bank ETFs Rally on Upbeat Earnings
text: Invesco's wide-ranging bank ETFs are among the top-performing equity ETFs over the past week. Bank stocks rallied this week after reporting upbeat second-quarter earnings.

title: Invesco (IVZ) Set to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Decent inflows and favorable market performance are likely to have supported Invesco's (IVZ) Q2 earnings.

title: Invesco (IVZ) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Invesco (IVZ) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Invesco Executes Share Splits: What This Means for Investors
text: Invesco is executing share splits for several funds in its range of equity ETFs. The Atlanta-headquartered firm is executing forward splits for 23 funds and reverse splits for three funds, impacting some of the firm's largest ETFs.

title: Invesco Ltd. Announces June 30, 2023 Assets Under Management
text: ATLANTA , July 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) today reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1,538.2 billion, an increase of 3.4% versus previous month-end.

title: SEC approves new rules for money market funds, critics say it will cost investors
text: The Securities and Exchange Commission voted Wednesday to impose new rules on money-market mutual funds in an effort to prevent potential runs on their assets that could require a federal bailout.

title: Gold remains an important strategic asset even if the market faces Fed rate hike headwinds - Invesco's Hooper
text: (Kitco News) - The gold market remains trapped below $1,950 an ounce as the Federal Reserve is expected to maintain its aggressive monetary policies through the summer; however, price action is one factor that investors should be looking at when building a core position in gold, according to one market strategist.

title: Invesco QQQ ETF investors: Buy JP Morgan's JEPQ too
text: Investing in technology stocks and ETFs has been a great way to make money over the years. In this period, companies like Tesla, Amazon, and Google have grown from small startups to trillion-dollar companies.
